blocks.text: Match preview: West Indies face Sri Lanka in 1st Test (TEST) on Thu, 25 Jun, 2026, 7:30 pm at Sir Vivian Richards Stadium North Sound, Antigua. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: Sri Lanka tour of West Indies 2026
Sir Vivian Richards Stadium North Sound, Antigua

blocks.text: Standard TEST surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 300–400 runs per innings typical.
Light drizzle · High 30°C / Low 27°C · Rain: 1.1 mm · Wind: up to 28 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
